reference_images.label: umbra_scale_moodboard
reference_images.purpose: Tower chamber palette, art deco framing, light beam composition, and shadow contrast anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: Use SpriteSheetBundle with five numbered states and swap atlas frames based on the authored weight value in gameplay data.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/obstacle_weight_block_set_32x32_values_1_5.png through AssetServer and select frame indices from the weight value component.
runtime_notes: Each frame maps to one discrete gameplay weight from 1 through 5.
Number glyphs must stay readable from the default camera without UI scaling.
Grip position stays centered so moving the block feels consistent across all five values.

context.usage: Movable block set used to tune scale torque and create alternate floor solutions with discrete visible weights.

shape.silhouette: Dense square block with beveled corners, central numeral plate, and a small grab lip on the top edge.

specs.texture: Stone body with metal number plate and small amber wear accents on high contact edges.
specs.shading: Dark violet side faces with brighter gold rim around the numeral plate.

acceptance_criteria: State sheet is exactly 160x32 px with five 32x32 frames.
Numerals 1 through 5 are centered on the number plate and remain readable at 100 percent camera scale.
Every frame uses the same outer contour so value swaps do not alter collision bounds.
